title: phyllanthus meridensis
intro: Phyllanthus meridensis, also known as quebra-pedra, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus meridensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, such as capsules, teas, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including liver disease and viral infections.
